old_claim.note: Asteroid Industrial Ecosystems is a plausible dependency for a forecast technology and should be treated as speculative.

new_claim.note: Supply-chain management software and logistics modeling provide the planning, inventory, routing, campaign analysis, and network-optimization foundation for interplanetary supply chains.

source_shape.source_locator: AIAA's Space Logistics Technical Committee lists A Modeling Framework for Interplanetary Supply Chains under space campaign logistics analysis methods, alongside related asset-management and interplanetary supply-chain database work.
source_shape.source_claim_summary: Interplanetary supply chains are modeled through logistics-analysis and supply-chain-management methods rather than requiring a full asteroid industrial ecosystem.
source_shape.source_support_rationale: The old edge made one destination industry a prerequisite; the source supports the broader planning, modeling, inventory, and logistics-management capability that coordinates all destinations.

ontology_before: The graph made interplanetary supply chains depend directly on asteroid industrial ecosystems, implying asteroid mining/refining/manufacturing infrastructure must precede the logistics network.
ontology_after: The graph routes interplanetary supply chains through supply-chain management software, space flight, and orbital propellant depots, keeping asteroid industrial ecosystems as one possible serviced destination rather than a prerequisite.
invariant_preserved_or_changed: Changed: interplanetary_supply_chains now depends on supply_chain_management_software and no longer directly on asteroid_industrial_ecosystems.
would_reject_if: The node is later rescoped only to asteroid-based industry logistics rather than Earth-orbit-Moon-Mars-asteroid logistics broadly.
A source shows interplanetary supply chains specifically require asteroid industrial ecosystems rather than logistics modeling and supply-chain management.
A downstream node requires asteroid industrial supply networks and should point directly to asteroid_industrial_ecosystems.
short_reason: Supply-chain management is the direct logistics foundation; asteroid industrial ecosystems are a serviced domain, not a prerequisite.
